lockFileMaintenance.description: Refresh lockfiles (incl. website/package-lock.json) so transitive security fixes land without waiting for a direct-dependency bump.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge digest pins (GitHub Actions SHAs, Docker tag digests) — trivial, CI-gated, and the bulk of the PR noise. Majors/minors/lockfile stay manual.
Pin Python to 3.12.x — deployment target; revert of a premature 3.14 bump. Patch updates within 3.12 are fine; 3.13+ is a deliberate decision, not an auto-PR.
Group the Docusaurus packages — they release ~15 packages in lockstep, so a single PR avoids a flood.
